title: Watch this 100x developer use Codex… it’s insane
summary: David Ondrej features Pietro Schirano demonstrating advanced use of GitHub Codex in a podcast episode, framing the developer as exceptionally productive with code generation. The content promotes learning AI-assisted coding through multiple platforms and services.
